review_text: Battery barely lasts 3 hours. For a phone at this price, that's unacceptable.
The camera is phenomenal! Night mode photos look like they were taken by a DSLR.
Delivery took 15 days instead of the promised 3. Absolutely frustrating.
Display is bright and colorful. Best AMOLED panel I've seen under 20k.
Packaging was so bad the phone box was open when I received it.
Battery drains like water. Can't even get through half a day.
Sound from the speakers is just average. No bass at all.
Yeah right, 'premium' build quality. The back panel scratched on day one.
Customer service hung up on me twice. Never buying from this brand again.
Software is clean, no bloatware. Android experience is near-stock.
Packaging arrived torn and the charger was missing from the box!
Battery charge takes 2 hours but dies in 3. Waste of money.
Bahut ghatiya packaging. Phone ka box tuta hua aaya.
Camera zoom is a joke. Anything beyond 2x is just pixelated noise.
Performance is buttery smooth. No lag even with 20 apps open.
Price seems high but you get what you pay for. Worth every rupee.
My package came completely crushed. Third order from this seller with damaged packaging.
The display cracked after a minor drop. Gorilla Glass? More like paper glass.
Fast delivery in just 1 day! Impressed with the logistics.
Battery is the biggest weakness. Everything else about this phone is great.
Oh great, another update that makes the phone slower. Thanks for the 'improvement'.
Build quality is top-notch. Metal frame feels solid and premium.
Packaging was damaged AGAIN. This is the fourth time now. Fix your shipping!
The selfie camera is not great. Photos look washed out in indoor lighting.

Zabardast camera! Mast photos aate hain. Paisa vasool!
Speaker volume is too low. Can barely hear anything in a noisy room.
The phone heats up badly during gaming. Performance drops after 10 minutes.
Packaging issue is becoming a pattern. Amazon needs better quality control.
Battery not lasting even half a day now. Regret this purchase.
Display resolution is sharp. Text and images look crisp.
Delivery courier threw the package over my gate. Absolutely pathetic service.
Customer support is helpful. Got my issue resolved in one call.
The UI is clean but software updates are painfully slow to arrive.
Camera in daylight is superb. Colors are natural and details are sharp.
Build feels flimsy. Plastic back creaks when you press it.
Overall a decent phone but the battery ruins the experience.
